system.name: AI AppSec Harness Import
system.description: Importable AI AppSec review harness used by Codex, Claude Code, or another AI tool through repository guidance, skills, prompts, templates, and seed control catalogs.

data.sensitive_data_notes: The public harness should not contain secrets, customer data, private tickets, internal wiki links, or organization-specific review artifacts.

evidence.path: git commit or release tag should be recorded by the importing repo
